title: Xenial Comforting Filipino Rice Pilaf
description: A comforting Filipino dish featuring minced garlic and a blend of spices, this Xenial Comforting Filipino Rice Pilaf is a satvik-friendly and yeasty meal option.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the rice to the saucepan, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Add the salt, pepper, and yeast to the saucepan, stirring to combine.
Add the water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
